python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
for i, line in enumerate(Path('docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl').read_text().splitlines(), 1):

local_validation.notes: The failing sibling modules had callable definitions nested inside a module-level do, unlike the already-passing xpath.fk top-level shape. Lifting only the outer wrapper keeps behavior unchanged for Go/Rust/TypeScript and lets fkwu register the functions as callable rows. The focused manifest gate passed for dns, session, doc-xpath, and concept-xpath after the rebase. symbols remains outside this admission because it still mismatches at 5/1 due the recipe_to_bytes/bytes_to_recipe wire path. A concurrent sibling worktree ran a broad pkill/full-validation cycle during an attempted aggregate run; that invalid aggregate reported 183 four-way, 584 ok, and 1 divergent after bml-thesis-char-escapes-source-proof lost Go/Rust/TypeScript children. This focused release intentionally avoids spending more nutrition on repeated full-suite validation under shared-runner contention.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this Form manifest floor slice.

phase_gate.gate: doc-xpath, concept-xpath, dns, and session validate across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
phase_gate.next: Push PR, wait for checks, merge when checks allow, then continue on a clean non-overlapping branch: symbols recipe-byte bridge, record carrier completion, or float-native value ABI.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The focused fourth-arm manifest floor moves to 189 admitted four-way rows after adding doc-xpath, concept-xpath, dns, and session on top of the current sister floors. The connected-tissue north star stays aligned by recording the exact focused gate, the latest quiet-host aggregate before this ratchet, the native proof ledger, and the JSONL compatibility row without making repeated full-suite validation the release bottleneck.
